name: CIViC_-_Clinical_Interpretation_of_Variants_in_Cancer
description: CIViC is an open access, open source, community-driven web resource for Clinical Interpretation of Variants in Cancer. Our goal is to enable precision medicine by providing an educational forum to disseminate knowledge and encourage active discussion of the clinical significance of cancer genome alterations.
conditionsOfAccess: CIViC is intended for purely research purposes. It should not be used for emergencies or medical or professional advice.
citeAs: Griffith M, Spies NC, Krysiak K, McMichael JF, Coffman AC, Danos AM, Ainscough BJ, Ramirez CA, Rieke DT, Kujan L, Barnell EK, Wagner AH, Skidmore ZL, Wollam A, Liu CJ, Jones MR, Bilski RL, Lesurf R, Feng YY, Shah NM, Bonakdar M, Trani L, Matlock M, Ramu A, Campbell KM, Spies GC, Graubert AP, Gangavarapu K, Eldred JM, Larson DE, Walker JR, Good BM, Wu C, Su AI, Dienstmann R, Margolin AA, Tamborero D, Lopez-Bigas N, Jones SJ, Bose R, Spencer DH Wartman LD, Wilson RK, Mardis ER, Griffith OL. 2016. CIViC is a community knowledgebase for expert crowdsourcing the clinical interpretation of variants in cancer. Nat Genet. 49, 170-174 (2017); doi: doi.org/10.1038/ng.3774.

creator.name: The McDonnell Genome Institute at Washington University School of Medicine

funder.name: National Center for Advancing Translational Sciences (NCATS)

distribution.name: evidence_accepted_tsv
distribution.description: Accepted clinical evidence summaries for the 01-Mar-2026 monthly release. Each row is one curated evidence item linking a molecular profile to a clinical outcome, supported by a peer-reviewed publication.

distribution.name: assertion_accepted_tsv
distribution.description: Accepted assertion summaries for the 01-Mar-2026 monthly release. Assertions are clinically actionable statements supported by multiple evidence items, classified per AMP/ASCO/CAP or ACMG/AMP guidelines.

distribution.name: feature_tsv
distribution.description: Feature summaries for the 01-Mar-2026 monthly release. Features include genes, fusions, and factors (non-coding or non-gene features) catalogued in CIViC.

distribution.name: variant_tsv
distribution.description: Variant summaries for the 01-Mar-2026 monthly release. Each row describes one variant (SNV, indel, fusion, etc.) including genomic coordinates, HGVS descriptions, and cross-references to ClinVar and the Allele Registry.

distribution.name: molecular_profile_tsv
distribution.description: Molecular profile summaries for the 01-Mar-2026 monthly release. A molecular profile (MP) is comprised of one or more variants; complex MPs enable clinical annotation of multi-variant combinations.

distribution.name: variant_group_tsv
distribution.description: Variant group summaries for the 01-Mar-2026 monthly release. Variant groups are manually curated collections of related variants.

distribution.name: evidence_accepted_submitted_tsv
distribution.description: Accepted and submitted clinical evidence summaries for the 01-Mar-2026 monthly release. Includes both accepted evidence items and items in submitted (pending review) status. Same schema as evidence_accepted_tsv.

distribution.name: accepted_vcf
distribution.description: Accepted variants in VCF v4.2 format for the 01-Mar-2026 monthly release, generated by CIViCpy. Reference genome: GRCh37. Custom INFO fields: GN (HGNC gene symbol), VT (CIViC variant name), CSQ (consequence annotations including variant ID, molecular profile, evidence, and assertion details). The CSQ FORMAT string lists 39 sub-fields including allele, consequence, gene, HGVS, CIViC IDs, clinical significance, therapies, and evidence rating.

recordSet.name: evidence_accepted
recordSet.description: Schema for the accepted clinical evidence summaries TSV (01-Mar-2026 release).

field.name: molecular_profile
field.description: Name of the molecular profile (one or more variants) associated with this evidence item.

field.name: molecular_profile_id
field.description: CIViC internal integer identifier for the molecular profile.

field.name: disease
field.description: Cancer disease associated with this evidence item.

field.name: doid
field.description: Disease Ontology identifier (e.g. DOID:123) for the associated disease.

field.name: phenotypes
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of associated phenotypes (Human Phenotype Ontology terms).

field.name: therapies
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of therapies (drugs or treatments) referenced in this evidence item.

field.name: therapy_interaction_type
field.description: Type of interaction among listed therapies (e.g. COMBINATION, SUBSTITUTES, SEQUENTIAL).

field.name: evidence_type
field.description: Category of clinical evidence: Predictive, Diagnostic, Prognostic, Predisposing, Oncogenic, or Functional.

field.name: evidence_direction
field.description: Whether the evidence supports or does not support the clinical assertion (SUPPORTS or DOES_NOT_SUPPORT).

field.name: evidence_level
field.description: Strength of evidence: A (validated), B (clinical), C (case study), D (preclinical), or E (inferential).

field.name: significance
field.description: Clinical significance of the molecular profile in the context of this evidence type (e.g. SENSITIVITYRESPONSE, RESISTANCE, PATHOGENIC, POOR_OUTCOME).

field.name: evidence_statement
field.description: Free-text summary of the clinical relevance of the molecular profile as described in the cited source.

field.name: citation_id
field.description: Identifier for the source publication (PubMed ID, ASCO abstract ID, or ASH abstract ID).

field.name: source_type
field.description: Type of source: PUBMED, ASCO, or ASH.

field.name: asco_abstract_id
field.description: ASCO abstract identifier when source_type is ASCO.

field.name: citation
field.description: Full bibliographic citation string for the source publication.

field.name: nct_ids
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of ClinicalTrials.gov NCT identifiers associated with this evidence.

field.name: rating
field.description: Curator trust rating from 1 (poor) to 5 (excellent) reflecting the strength and reproducibility of the experimental evidence.

field.name: evidence_status
field.description: Curation workflow status of this evidence item (accepted, submitted, or rejected).

field.name: evidence_id
field.description: CIViC internal integer identifier for this evidence item.

field.name: variant_origin
field.description: Origin of the variant: SOMATIC, RARE_GERMLINE, COMMON_GERMLINE, UNKNOWN, NA, or NOT_APPLICABLE.

field.name: last_review_date
field.description: Date this evidence item was last reviewed by a CIViC editor (ISO 8601 date).

field.name: evidence_civic_url
field.description: URL to this evidence item's page on civicdb.org.

field.name: molecular_profile_civic_url
field.description: URL to the associated molecular profile's page on civicdb.org.

field.name: is_flagged
field.description: Whether this evidence item has been flagged for review by the community.

recordSet.name: assertion_accepted
recordSet.description: Schema for the accepted assertion summaries TSV (01-Mar-2026 release).

field.name: molecular_profile
field.description: Name of the molecular profile associated with this assertion.

field.name: molecular_profile_id
field.description: CIViC internal integer identifier for the molecular profile.

field.name: disease
field.description: Cancer disease associated with this assertion.

field.name: doid
field.description: Disease Ontology identifier for the associated disease.

field.name: phenotypes
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of associated HPO phenotype terms.

field.name: therapies
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of therapies referenced in this assertion.

field.name: assertion_type
field.description: Type of clinical assertion: Predictive, Diagnostic, Prognostic, or Predisposing.

field.name: assertion_direction
field.description: Direction of the clinical assertion (SUPPORTS or DOES_NOT_SUPPORT).

field.name: significance
field.description: Clinical significance of the molecular profile for this assertion type.

field.name: acmg_codes
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of ACMG/AMP classification codes applied to this assertion.

field.name: amp_category
field.description: AMP/ASCO/CAP somatic variant classification tier (e.g. TIER_I_LEVEL_A through TIER_IV).

field.name: nccn_guideline
field.description: Referenced NCCN Clinical Practice Guideline, if applicable.

field.name: nccn_guideline_version
field.description: Version of the referenced NCCN guideline.

field.name: regulatory_approval
field.description: Whether a regulatory approval (e.g. FDA) exists for this therapy-variant combination.

field.name: fda_companion_test
field.description: Whether an FDA-approved companion diagnostic test exists for this molecular profile.

field.name: assertion_summary
field.description: Brief summary of the clinical assertion.

field.name: assertion_description
field.description: Extended description of the clinical assertion.

field.name: assertion_id
field.description: CIViC internal integer identifier for this assertion.

field.name: evidence_item_ids
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of CIViC evidence item IDs that support this assertion.

field.name: last_review_date
field.description: Date this assertion was last reviewed by a CIViC editor.

field.name: assertion_civic_url
field.description: URL to this assertion's page on civicdb.org.

field.name: evidence_items_civic_url
field.description: URL to the list of supporting evidence items on civicdb.org.

field.name: molecular_profile_civic_url
field.description: URL to the associated molecular profile's page on civicdb.org.

field.name: is_flagged
field.description: Whether this assertion has been flagged for review.

recordSet.name: feature
recordSet.description: Schema for the feature summaries TSV (01-Mar-2026 release). Features include genes, fusions, and factors.

field.name: feature_id
field.description: CIViC internal integer identifier for this feature.

field.name: feature_civic_url
field.description: URL to this feature's page on civicdb.org.

field.name: feature_type
field.description: Type of feature: Gene, Fusion, or Factor.

field.name: name
field.description: Name of the feature (HGNC gene symbol, fusion name, or factor name).

field.name: feature_aliases
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of aliases for this feature.

field.name: description
field.description: Curator-written summary of this feature's role in cancer.

field.name: last_review_date
field.description: Date this feature was last reviewed by a CIViC editor.

field.name: is_flagged
field.description: Whether this feature has been flagged for review.

field.name: entrez_id
field.description: NCBI Entrez Gene identifier (for gene features).

field.name: ncit_id
field.description: NCI Thesaurus identifier (for factor features).

field.name: five_prime_partner_status
field.description: Status of the 5-prime fusion partner gene (for fusion features).

field.name: three_prime_partner_status
field.description: Status of the 3-prime fusion partner gene (for fusion features).

field.name: five_prime_gene_id
field.description: CIViC feature ID for the 5-prime partner gene (for fusion features).

field.name: five_prime_gene_name
field.description: HGNC symbol of the 5-prime partner gene (for fusion features).

field.name: five_prime_gene_entrez_id
field.description: Entrez Gene ID of the 5-prime partner gene (for fusion features).

field.name: three_prime_gene_id
field.description: CIViC feature ID for the 3-prime partner gene (for fusion features).

field.name: three_prime_gene_name
field.description: HGNC symbol of the 3-prime partner gene (for fusion features).

field.name: three_prime_gene_entrez_id
field.description: Entrez Gene ID of the 3-prime partner gene (for fusion features).

recordSet.name: variant
recordSet.description: Schema for the variant summaries TSV (01-Mar-2026 release). Each row describes one variant with genomic coordinates and cross-references.

field.name: variant_id
field.description: CIViC internal integer identifier for this variant.

field.name: variant_civic_url
field.description: URL to this variant's page on civicdb.org.

field.name: feature_type
field.description: Type of the parent feature (Gene, Fusion, or Factor).

field.name: feature_id
field.description: CIViC identifier for the parent feature.

field.name: feature_name
field.description: Name of the parent feature.

field.name: feature_civic_url
field.description: URL to the parent feature's page on civicdb.org.

field.name: variant
field.description: Name of the variant as used in CIViC (e.g. V600E, EXON 14 SKIPPING).

field.name: variant_aliases
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of aliases for this variant.

field.name: is_flagged
field.description: Whether this variant has been flagged for review.

field.name: variant_groups
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of variant group names this variant belongs to.

field.name: variant_types
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of Sequence Ontology variant type terms.

field.name: single_variant_molecular_profile_id
field.description: CIViC ID of the simple molecular profile (single-variant) for this variant.

field.name: last_review_date
field.description: Date this variant was last reviewed by a CIViC editor.

field.name: gene
field.description: HGNC gene symbol (for gene or fusion variants).

field.name: entrez_id
field.description: NCBI Entrez Gene identifier.

field.name: chromosome
field.description: Chromosome of the variant in GRCh37 coordinates.

field.name: start
field.description: 1-based start position of the variant on GRCh37.

field.name: stop
field.description: 1-based stop position of the variant on GRCh37.

field.name: reference_bases
field.description: Reference allele bases at this position.

field.name: variant_bases
field.description: Alternate allele bases for this variant.

field.name: representative_transcript
field.description: Ensembl transcript identifier used as the representative transcript for HGVS annotation.

field.name: ensembl_version
field.description: Ensembl database version used for transcript annotation.

field.name: reference_build
field.description: Genome reference assembly (e.g. GRCh37, GRCh38).

field.name: hgvs_descriptions
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of HGVS expressions for this variant.

field.name: allele_registry_id
field.description: ClinGen Allele Registry canonical allele identifier (CA prefix).

field.name: clinvar_ids
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of ClinVar variation IDs.

field.name: ncit_id
field.description: NCI Thesaurus identifier for this variant (if applicable).

field.name: 5_prime_partner_status
field.description: Status of the 5-prime fusion partner (for fusion variants).

field.name: 5_prime_partner
field.description: Name of the 5-prime fusion partner gene (for fusion variants).

field.name: 3_prime_partner_status
field.description: Status of the 3-prime fusion partner (for fusion variants).

field.name: 3_prime_partner
field.description: Name of the 3-prime fusion partner gene (for fusion variants).

field.name: vicc_compliant_name
field.description: VICC-compliant fusion variant name.

field.name: 5_prime_transcript
field.description: Transcript identifier for the 5-prime fusion partner.

field.name: 5_prime_end_exon
field.description: Last exon of the 5-prime fusion partner included in the fusion transcript.

field.name: 5_prime_exon_offset
field.description: Nucleotide offset into the last exon of the 5-prime partner.

field.name: 5_prime_exon_offset_direction
field.description: Direction of the 5-prime exon offset (+ or -).

field.name: 3_prime_transcript
field.description: Transcript identifier for the 3-prime fusion partner.

field.name: 3_prime_start_exon
field.description: First exon of the 3-prime fusion partner included in the fusion transcript.

field.name: 3_prime_exon_offset
field.description: Nucleotide offset into the first exon of the 3-prime partner.

field.name: 3_prime_exon_offset_direction
field.description: Direction of the 3-prime exon offset (+ or -).

recordSet.name: molecular_profile
recordSet.description: Schema for the molecular profile summaries TSV (01-Mar-2026 release). A molecular profile is comprised of one or more variants and is the unit to which evidence items are associated.

field.name: name
field.description: Name of the molecular profile.

field.name: molecular_profile_id
field.description: CIViC internal integer identifier for this molecular profile.

field.name: summary
field.description: Curator-written summary of this molecular profile's clinical significance.

field.name: variant_ids
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of CIViC variant IDs comprising this molecular profile.

field.name: variants_civic_url
field.description: URL to the variants page for this molecular profile on civicdb.org.

field.name: evidence_score
field.description: Aggregate evidence score summing the ratings of all accepted evidence items associated with this molecular profile.

field.name: evidence_item_ids
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of CIViC evidence item IDs associated with this molecular profile.

field.name: evidence_items_civic_url
field.description: URL to the evidence items for this molecular profile on civicdb.org.

field.name: assertion_ids
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of CIViC assertion IDs associated with this molecular profile.

field.name: assertions_civic_url
field.description: URL to the assertions for this molecular profile on civicdb.org.

field.name: aliases
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of aliases for this molecular profile.

field.name: last_review_date
field.description: Date this molecular profile was last reviewed by a CIViC editor.

field.name: is_flagged
field.description: Whether this molecular profile has been flagged for review.

recordSet.name: variant_group
recordSet.description: Schema for the variant group summaries TSV (01-Mar-2026 release). Variant groups are manually curated collections of related variants.

field.name: variant_group_id
field.description: CIViC internal integer identifier for this variant group.

field.name: variant_group_civic_url
field.description: URL to this variant group's page on civicdb.org.

field.name: variant_group
field.description: Name of the variant group.

field.name: description
field.description: Curator-written description of this variant group.

field.name: last_review_date
field.description: Date this variant group was last reviewed by a CIViC editor.

field.name: is_flagged
field.description: Whether this variant group has been flagged for review.

recordSet.name: evidence_accepted_submitted
recordSet.description: Schema for the accepted-and-submitted clinical evidence summaries TSV (01-Mar-2026 release). Identical schema to evidence_accepted; includes items in both accepted and submitted status.

field.name: molecular_profile
field.description: Name of the molecular profile associated with this evidence item.

field.name: molecular_profile_id
field.description: CIViC internal integer identifier for the molecular profile.

field.name: disease
field.description: Cancer disease associated with this evidence item.

field.name: doid
field.description: Disease Ontology identifier for the associated disease.

field.name: phenotypes
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of associated HPO phenotype terms.

field.name: therapies
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of therapies referenced in this evidence item.

field.name: therapy_interaction_type
field.description: Type of interaction among listed therapies.

field.name: evidence_type
field.description: Category of clinical evidence.

field.name: evidence_direction
field.description: Whether the evidence supports or does not support the clinical assertion.

field.name: evidence_level
field.description: Strength of evidence level (A through E).

field.name: significance
field.description: Clinical significance of the molecular profile.

field.name: evidence_statement
field.description: Free-text summary of the clinical relevance.

field.name: citation_id
field.description: Identifier for the source publication.

field.name: source_type
field.description: Type of source: PUBMED, ASCO, or ASH.

field.name: asco_abstract_id
field.description: ASCO abstract identifier when source_type is ASCO.

field.name: citation
field.description: Full bibliographic citation string for the source publication.

field.name: nct_ids
field.description: Pipe-delimited list of ClinicalTrials.gov NCT identifiers.

field.name: rating
field.description: Curator trust rating from 1 (poor) to 5 (excellent).

field.name: evidence_status
field.description: Curation workflow status: accepted or submitted.

field.name: evidence_id
field.description: CIViC internal integer identifier for this evidence item.

field.name: variant_origin
field.description: Origin of the variant (SOMATIC, RARE_GERMLINE, COMMON_GERMLINE, etc.).

field.name: last_review_date
field.description: Date this evidence item was last reviewed.

field.name: evidence_civic_url
field.description: URL to this evidence item's page on civicdb.org.

field.name: molecular_profile_civic_url
field.description: URL to the associated molecular profile's page on civicdb.org.

field.name: is_flagged
field.description: Whether this evidence item has been flagged for review.
